entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: Isiqalo esicacile esibuza umqondo owodwa.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Umgibe ojwayelekile oxwayisa ngephutha elingase lenzeke.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Uhlangothi olufushane lwangemuva oluqedela umcabango.

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Iseluleko esincane esisiza ngaphandle kokudalula konke.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: Inketho yokubuyekeza ukuze amakhadi aphuthiwe abuye ngokushesha.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: Ukugeleza okulula kwamakhadi okufunda

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: Ikhadi eliqinile licela ukukhumbula:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Ikhadi eliwusizo libuza into eyodwa. Akufanele lifihle imibuzo emihlanu ngaphakathi komyalo owodwa. Kufanele licace ngokwanele ukuba liphendulwe, kodwa lingabi mncane kangangokuthi lingabi nencazelo.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Ikhadi lokufunda le-AI elibuthakathaka lithi:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: ukukhumbula okusebenzayo

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Engeza izeluleko ngaphandle kokudalula impendulo

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: I-AI ingasiza ukwenza amakhadi okufunda ngokushesha, kodwa ukufunda kusavela ekukhumbuleni. Uma ithuluzi libhala amakhadi bese umfundi engalokothi azabalaze ukuwaphendula, cishe akukho okushintshile. Inguqulo ewusizo iguqula amanothi axakile abe imiyalo egxilile, bese yenza umfundi akhumbule ngaphambi kokudalula impendulo.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: I-AI ingaguqula amanothi angahleleki abe imiyalo yokukhumbula ehlanzekile. Ingahlukanisa imibono ebanzi ibe amakhadi amancane, yengeze izibonelo, futhi ibone imigibe umfundi angase ayiphuthele.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: Amakhadi okufunda e-AI nokukhumbula okusebenzayo: indlela yokukhumbula okuningi

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: sebenzisa umqondo esibonelweni esincane.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Cela amakhadi omqondo owodwa anezeluleko nemigibe ejwayelekile.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Ngemuva: "Ukubeka izikhawu kuphoqa inkumbulo ukuthi iphinde yakhe impendulo ngemva kokukhohlwa okuthile, okuqinisa ukukhumbula kamuva."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: qhathanisa imibono emibili;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: chaza igama;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Susa amakhadi abanzi kakhulu noma asobala kakhulu.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Ungabuyekezi konke ngokulinganayo

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Kulula. Kuphushe kamuva.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: chaza imbangela;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Amakhadi okufunda angenye yezindlela ezilula kakhulu zokwenza lokhu.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Amakhadi okufunda anamandla, kodwa awasona sonke isinqubo sokutadisha. Alungele kakhulu ukubuyisa ulwazi, amagama, izincazelo, amafomula, umehluko, nezibonelo ezisemqoka. Abuthakathaka lapho umfundi engakaze awuqonde umqondo ekuqaleni.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Amakhadi okufunda asebenza kahle kakhulu lapho evivinya umqondo owodwa ngesikhathi, eveza izimpendulo kuphela ngemva komzamo, futhi ebuyekeza amakhadi aphuthelwe ngokushesha.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Ukuze uthole umzila ojulile, funda umhlahlandlela we-Flashcard Builder kanye nemiyalo ye-Flashcard Builder nomjikelezo wokufunda. Inhloso akulona iqoqo elihle lamakhadi. Inhloso ukukhumbula okuningi lapho amanothi esephelile.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: Isibonelo:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Ngaphambili: "Kungani ukubuyekeza ngezikhawu kusebenza kangcono kunokugcwalisa konke ngesikhathi esisodwa?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Kunzima. Buyekeza ngemva kokubambezeleka okufushane.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Iseluleko: "Cabanga ngokukhohlwa nokubuyisa ulwazi."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Izeluleko ziwusizo lapho zigcina umzamo. Iseluleko esibi siyimpendulo efihlekile. Iseluleko esihle sinciphisa indawo yokusesha.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: hlonza iphutha elivamile;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: Uma ikhadi lihlala lihluleka, ungaliphindi kuphela. Buza ukuthi kungani linzima. Sebenzisa i-Socratic Instruction ukuthola ukungaqondi, i-Math Step Coach ngezikhala zenqubo, noma umtapo wemiyalo yokufunda nge-AI ukuthola umyalo wokutadisha ongcono.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: I-Flashcard Builder ye-inspir yakhelwe lowo mjikelezo wokukhumbula okusebenzayo: yakha iqoqo, zama uhlangothi lwangaphambili, veza impendulo, linganisa ukukhumbula kwakho, bese ubuyekeza okuphuthelwe kuze umqondo ubambelele.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Kuphuthelwe. Buyekeza maduzane.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Iphutha elilodwa abafundi abalenzayo ukuphatha wonke amakhadi ngokufanayo. Uma wazi ikhadi ngokushesha, ukulibuyekeza futhi kusasa kungachitha isikhathi. Uma uphuthelwa ikhadi, ukulinda isonto kungaba kude kakhulu.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Hlanganisa amakhadi okufunda nokuqonda

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Namathisela ucezu oluncane lwamanothi ku-Flashcard Builder.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: I-photosynthesis: inqubo izitshalo eziyisebenzisayo ukwenza ukudla.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: Linganisa ukukhumbula ngokwethembeka.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Amanothi okufunda azwakala ekhiqiza. Ukuwakhumbula kamuva kuyisivivinyo sangempela.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: khumbula ukulandelana;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Buyekeza ngaphandle kokubheka emuva.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Amakhadi aqinile avame ukufaka:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: amakhono okutadisha

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Lelo seluleko sisiza umfundi aqale ngaphandle kokususa isenzo sokukhumbula. I-Flashcard Builder ye-inspir yakhelwe lo mjikelezo wokudalula nokulinganisa: zama kuqala, dalula kwesibili, linganisa ngokwethembeka, bese ubuyisa amakhadi abuthakathaka ngokushesha.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Yingakho ukukhumbula okusebenzayo kubalulekile. Esikhundleni sokubheka impendulo, uzama ukuyikhipha enkumbulweni. Umzamo uqinisa inkumbulo futhi uveza okusadinga umsebenzi.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Umfundi usadinga ukwenza ukukhumbula. Yilona phuzu.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Ikhadi lesibili lenza umfundi akhumbule ubudlelwano, hhayi ukuqaphela umusho kuphela. Amakhadi amahle avame ukugxila komunye wale misebenzi:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: Lokhu akudingi ukuba kube nzima. Ingxenye ebalulekile ukuthi ishejuli yakho yokubuyekeza iphendule enkumbulweni esikhundleni sokuphatha iqoqo njengohlu olumile.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Kuzame ku-Flashcard Builder. Uma udinga ukuqonda isihloko ngaphambi kokwenza amakhadi, qala ku-Learn Anything. Uma ufuna ingcindezi ngemva kokubuyekeza amakhadi, dlulela ku-Quiz Me On Trivia noma ku-Viva Practice.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: Guqula amanothi abe amakhadi angcono

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: Guqula ukuphuthelwa okuphindaphindiwe kube umbuzo we-Learn Anything.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Sebenzisa lo mjikelezo:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Sebenzisa izilinganiso ezintathu:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: Iyini indima ye-chlorophyll ku-photosynthesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: Okwenza ikhadi lokufunda libe lihle

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Lapho unamathisela amanothi ku-AI, yicele ihlukanise imibono ebanzi ibe yileyo misebenzi. Iqoqo elinamakhadi acacile angu-18 ngokuvamile lingcono kuneqoqo elinamakhadi amakhulu angu-5 lapho ikhadi ngalinye liqukethe isigaba sonke.

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: Lapho i-AI isiza khona
